title: Arrays, Pointers, Arithmetic, and Bounds · Memory Trace: Array Pointer Distinction
summary: A raster pipeline slices rows and subviews while changed dimensions expose one-past, negative-offset, and lost-bound defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem array pointer distinction increment in bounded image-slice library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve array extent where possible and predict array-to-pointer conversion at expressions and parameters.
Use C23 memset_explicit or a reviewed non-elidable alternative for secrets and verify compiler and library support.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
